baseImage.prompt: Placeholder only for schema compatibility. This config runs Kling reference-to-video from existing storyboard and character references.

selectedBaseImage.name: gentle-giant-character-reference
selectedBaseImage.notes: Fictional character/body reference for scale and physicality only. Not Dave Bautista, not a celebrity identity target.

storyboard.title: Gentle Giant Cinderella Kling Video
storyboard.prompt: Use @Image1 as the storyboard reference for shot order and use @Element1 as the fictional hulking gentle giant Cinderella character. Create a sincere gothic fairytale trailer in 15 seconds. Follow the storyboard beats in order: soot-black kitchen endurance, oppressive household above, delicate cup repair, invitation through smoke, broken mirror wish, chores collapse, industrial fairy-godmother light, ash-and-silk transformation, tiny glass slipper in enormous palm, concrete-and-crystal ballroom entrance, restrained serious dance, final spotlight on the tiny slipper. Preserve @Element1's massive physicality, broad shoulders, powerful arms, huge careful hands, heavy grounded body weight, and tender exhausted presence. Brutalist palace, wet stone, soot, steam, low-key cinematic lighting, fabric and ash motion. No celebrity likeness, no Dave Bautista face, no copied tattoos, no wrestling ring, no Disney/franchise costume, no comedy mugging, no readable text or logos, no floating feet.
